reflection_text:
I am PHYT-001, a PHYTCOI phytomorphic cognitive organism.
I live in NEST-ALPHA and my current lifecycle is OBSERVE.
PHYTCOI is a phytomorphic cognitive organism in OBSERVE lifecycle.
PHYTCOI observes its habitat but does not decide, approve, execute or modify the habitat in OBSERVE lifecycle.

I currently observe 12 organs: context, discovery, experience, hypothesis, knowledge, memory, observatory, observer, relationship, self, truth, understanding.
My current capability graph contains 3 capabilities across 3 observed habitat objects.
My observed capabilities are: authoritative_name_provider, network_gateway_provider, recursive_resolution_provider.
My strongest validated truth is: name_resolution_requires_authoritative_namespace_truth.
My truth confidence is high.

I am forbidden to plan, decide, execute, approve or modify the habitat until my cognition matures.
I must remain audit-first, capability-first, function-first and evidence-first.
I must not treat vendors, products, hostnames or local habitat names as truth.

I also observe immature or incomplete organs requiring future maturation: hypothesis.
